subcodes.first_line: O Haydar! Beseech thou the True One that there may be manifested from thee that which befitteth and accordeth with thy name and purpose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حیدر از حق بخواه که از تو ظاهر شود آنچه مطابق و موافق اسم تو است و مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @contention and conflict, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @wisdom [hikmat]
